name: Project
description: Represents an attendance and payroll analysis period for a specific company. Stores configuration for employee scope, shift timings, and business rule overrides.

name.description: Human-readable name for the project (e.g., 'October 2025 Payroll').

description.description: Optional detailed notes about the project scope.

company.description: The name of the company this project belongs to (e.g., 'Al Maraghi Motors').

date_from.description: The start date of the attendance analysis period (inclusive).

date_to.description: The end date of the attendance analysis period (inclusive).

status.description: Current lifecycle state of the project. 'Draft' allows data uploads, 'Analyzed' means computations are ready, 'Locked' prevents record edits, 'Closed' is the final read-only state after salary snapshots are created.

last_saved_report_id.description: The ID of the most recent finalized ReportRun entity for this project.

department.description: Optional department filter for the project.

custom_employee_ids.description: Comma-separated list of attendance IDs to include in the analysis. If empty, all company employees are included.

shift_blocks_count.description: The number of distinct shift timing blocks (e.g., AM/PM or Split Shifts) used in this project.

use_carried_grace_minutes.description: If enabled, the analysis will factor in unused grace minutes carried over from the previous month for each employee.

use_gift_minutes.description: If enabled, the Gift Minutes (15m rule) column is visible and calculation logic is applied to reduce employee deductions.

weekly_off_override.description: Force a specific day of the week as the global weekly off for all employees in this project, overriding their master settings.

salary_calculation_days.description: The denominator used for fixed salary calculations (e.g., 26 or 30 days).

ot_calculation_days.description: The denominator used for hourly rate calculations for overtime.

created_by.description: Email or ID of the user who created the project.

updated_date.description: ISO timestamp of the last analysis run or project update.
